description: Pushed-ack tamper proof (v0.4, §14.4): the human's client recomputes ack_sha256 from the ack it received. The honest ack reproduces the signed digest and verifies; an ack whose `note` (or `by`) is altered in transit diverges the digest, so verification MUST fail with a signature mismatch — a terminating proxy cannot forge or rewrite a pushed receipt.
obligation: Honest ack verifies against v1; a tampered `note`/`by` fails with `signature mismatch` (not an incidental window/key/jti rejection).

honest_ack.note: got your Ship it — resuming the deploy
